<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Ange Das — Communications Strategist</title>
<meta name="description" content="Communications strategy, internal messaging programs, and content systems. Orlando, FL.">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;0,600;1,300;1,400;1,500;1,600&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,500;1,300;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --espresso:   #161210;
  --espresso-2: #231C16;
  --espresso-3: #2F2520;
  --mocha:      #9B7355;
  --mocha-2:    #B89474;
  --mocha-pale: #E5D0BA;
  --sage:       #3F5E47;
  --sage-2:     #5A7A62;
  --linen:      #F3EDE3;
  --linen-2:    #E8DFD2;
  --warm-white: #FDFAF6;
  --text-on-dark:  #EDE7DD;
  --muted-on-dark: #8A7D70;
  --text-on-light: #1C1813;
  --muted-on-light:#7A6E63;
  --border-dark:   rgba(237,231,221,0.08);
  --border-light:  rgba(28,24,19,0.10);
  --gap: 3px;
  --max: 1160px;
  --gutter: clamp(1.25rem,4.5vw,3.5rem);
  --font-d: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  --font-b: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif;
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;font-size:16px}
body{background:var(--espresso);color:var(--text-on-dark);font-family:var(--font-b);font-weight:400;line-height:1.7;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none}
img{display:block;max-width:100%;height:auto}

/* ── UTILITIES ── */
.wrap{max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto;padding:0 var(--gutter)}
.eyebrow{
  font-family:var(--font-b);font-size:.7rem;font-weight:500;
  letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mocha);
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.55rem
}
.eyebrow::before{content:'';display:inline-block;width:24px;height:1px;background:var(--mocha)}
.eyebrow.sage{color:var(--sage-2)}
.eyebrow.sage::before{background:var(--sage-2)}
.eyebrow.light{color:var(--mocha-2)}
.eyebrow.light::before{background:var(--mocha-2)}

/* scroll reveal */
.rv{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px);transition:opacity .65s ease,transform .65s ease}
.rv.in{opacity:1;transform:none}
.rv-l{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-22px);transition:opacity .65s ease,transform .65s ease}
.rv-l.in{opacity:1;transform:none}

/* ── NAV ── */
#nav{
  position:fixed;inset:0 0 auto 0;z-index:200;
  padding:0 var(--gutter);
  transition:background .35s,backdrop-filter .35s,border-color .35s
}
#nav.on{
  background:rgba(22,18,16,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-dark)
}
.nav-inner{
  max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;height:66px
}
.nav-logo{font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.05em;color:var(--text-on-dark)}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{
  font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:.09em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--muted-on-dark);transition:color .2s
}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--mocha-2)}
.nav-btn{
  font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;
  padding:.5rem 1.3rem;border:1px solid rgba(237,231,221,.25);color:var(--text-on-dark);
  background:transparent;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .2s,background .2s
}
.nav-btn:hover{border-color:var(--mocha);background:rgba(155,115,85,.12)}

/* ── HERO ── */
#hero{
  min-height:100svh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;
  padding:110px var(--gutter) 70px;position:relative;overflow:hidden
}
.hero-noise{
  position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 55% at 75% 25%, rgba(155,115,85,.11) 0%,transparent 70%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 45% 60% at 15% 75%, rgba(63,94,71,.09) 0%,transparent 65%);
}
.hero-content{max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto;width:100%;position:relative}
.hero-eye{opacity:0;animation:fup .7s .15s ease forwards}
.hero-h1{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:clamp(3.2rem,7vw,7rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.04;letter-spacing:-.015em;
  color:var(--text-on-dark);max-width:780px;
  opacity:0;animation:fup .8s .3s ease forwards
}
.hero-h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--mocha-2)}
.hero-h1 strong{font-weight:500;font-style:normal}
.hero-sub{
  margin-top:1.75rem;max-width:520px;
  font-size:1rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--muted-on-dark);line-height:1.85;
  opacity:0;animation:fup .8s .5s ease forwards
}
.hero-btns{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1.4rem;margin-top:2.8rem;flex-wrap:wrap;
  opacity:0;animation:fup .8s .7s ease forwards
}
.btn-fill{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;
  padding:.85rem 2rem;background:var(--mocha);color:var(--warm-white);
  font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,transform .2s
}
.btn-fill:hover{background:var(--mocha-2);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.btn-ghost{
  font-size:.78rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--muted-on-dark);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(237,231,221,.2);
  padding-bottom:2px;transition:color .2s,border-color .2s
}
.btn-ghost:hover{color:var(--mocha-2);border-color:var(--mocha-2)}
.hero-foot{
  margin-top:4rem;
  opacity:0;animation:fup .8s .95s ease forwards;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3rem;flex-wrap:wrap
}
.hero-stat{}
.hs-num{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:2.6rem;font-weight:300;
  color:var(--text-on-dark);line-height:1
}
.hs-num sub{font-size:1.4rem;vertical-align:baseline}
.hs-label{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted-on-dark);margin-top:.25rem}
.hero-divider{width:1px;height:52px;background:rgba(237,231,221,.12)}
@keyframes fup{to{opacity:1;transform:none}}

/* ── MARQUEE ── */
.marquee-wrap{overflow:hidden;padding:.7rem 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border-dark);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-dark)}
.marquee-track{display:flex;width:max-content;animation:ticker 35s linear infinite}
.marquee-item{
  white-space:nowrap;padding:0 2rem;
  font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted-on-dark)
}
.marquee-dot{color:var(--mocha);padding:0 .4rem;font-size:.5rem;vertical-align:middle}
@keyframes ticker{to{transform:translateX(-50%)}}

/* ── STATS STRIP ── */
#stats{background:var(--espresso-2);border-top:1px solid var(--border-dark);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-dark)}
.stats-row{
  max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto;padding:0 var(--gutter);
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr)
}
.stat-cell{padding:2.5rem 1rem;border-right:1px solid var(--border-dark);text-align:center}
.stat-cell:last-child{border-right:none}
.snum{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:clamp(2.8rem,4.5vw,4.2rem);
  font-weight:300;color:var(--text-on-dark);line-height:1
}
.snum em{font-style:normal;color:var(--mocha-2)}
.slabel{margin-top:.4rem;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted-on-dark)}

/* ── WORK / BENTO ── */
#work{background:var(--espresso);padding:clamp(60px,7vw,100px) 0}
.work-header{
  max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto var(--gutter);
  padding:0 var(--gutter);
  display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:2rem;flex-wrap:wrap
}
.work-hed{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4vw,3.6rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.12;color:var(--text-on-dark);margin-top:.8rem
}
.work-hed em{font-style:italic;color:var(--mocha-2)}
.work-note{
  font-size:.82rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--muted-on-dark);
  max-width:280px;line-height:1.75;text-align:right
}
.bento{
  max-width:var(--max);margin:0 auto;padding:0 var(--gutter);
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(12,1fr);
  grid-auto-rows:auto;gap:var(--gap)
}
.bc{
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;
  background:var(--espresso-2)
}
.bc img{
  width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;
  transition:transform .55s ease,filter .55s ease;filter:brightness(.88)
}
.bc:hover img{transform:scale(1.03);filter:brightness(.95)}
.bc-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(22,18,16,.85) 0%, rgba(22,18,16,.25) 55%, transparent 100%);
  transition:opacity .35s
}
.bc:hover .bc-overlay{opacity:.7}
.bc-badge{
  position:absolute;top:.85rem;left:.85rem;
  font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;
  padding:.28rem .75rem;background:var(--mocha);color:#fff;
}
.bc-badge.sage{background:var(--sage)}
.bc-info{
  position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:1.2rem 1.1rem .9rem;
}
.bc-title{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:clamp(1rem,1.5vw,1.2rem);
  font-weight:500;color:var(--text-on-dark);line-height:1.25
}
.bc-co{
  margin-top:.25rem;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.06em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mocha-pale);opacity:.65
}

/* Bento cell positions */
.bc-newsletter  {grid-column:1/5;  grid-row:1/3;  min-height:520px}
.bc-summit      {grid-column:5/9;  grid-row:1/2;  min-height:252px}
.bc-masterclass {grid-column:9/13; grid-row:1/2;  min-height:252px}
.bc-winter      {grid-column:5/9;  grid-row:2/3;  min-height:252px}
.bc-training    {grid-column:9/13; grid-row:2/3;  min-height:252px}
.bc-dealzone    {grid-column:1/5;  grid-row:3/4;  min-height:230px}
.bc-survey      {grid-column:5/9;  grid-row:3/4;  min-height:230px}
.bc-feedback    {grid-column:9/13; grid-row:3/4;  min-height:230px}

/* ── ABOUT ── */
#about{background:var(--linen);padding:clamp(70px,8vw,110px) 0}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(3rem,6vw,7rem);align-items:start}
.about-portrait-wrap{position:relative}
.about-portrait{
  width:100%;aspect-ratio:4/5;background:var(--linen-2);
  overflow:hidden;position:relative
}
.portrait-placeholder{
  position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;
  background:linear-gradient(160deg,var(--linen-2) 0%,var(--espresso-3) 100%)
}
.portrait-mono{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:6rem;font-weight:300;
  color:rgba(243,237,227,.18);letter-spacing:.04em;line-height:1
}
.portrait-hint{
  font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(243,237,227,.3);text-align:center;max-width:160px;line-height:1.65
}
.about-accent-block{
  margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1.5rem 1.25rem;
  background:var(--espresso);border-left:3px solid var(--mocha)
}
.aab-text{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:1.12rem;font-style:italic;
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.65;color:var(--text-on-dark)
}
.aab-cite{
  display:block;margin-top:.75rem;
  font-family:var(--font-b);font-size:.72rem;font-style:normal;
  letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted-on-dark)
}
.about-text{color:var(--text-on-light)}
.about-hed{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:clamp(2.2rem,3.5vw,3.4rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.12;margin-top:1rem;color:var(--text-on-light)
}
.about-hed em{font-style:italic;color:var(--mocha)}
.about-body{
  margin-top:1.8rem;font-size:.95rem;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.9;color:var(--muted-on-light)
}
.about-body p+p{margin-top:1.1rem}
.about-body strong{color:var(--text-on-light);font-weight:400}
.about-tags{margin-top:2.2rem;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.5rem}
.atag{
  font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:.3rem .85rem;background:var(--linen-2);color:var(--muted-on-light)
}
.rec-preview{
  margin-top:1.8rem;position:relative;cursor:pointer
}
.rec-img{width:100%;border:1px solid var(--linen-2);display:block}
.rec-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(22,18,16,.04);
  display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:flex-start;padding:.75rem
}
.rec-label{
  font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;
  background:var(--mocha);color:#fff;padding:.3rem .7rem
}

/* ── SERVICES ── */
#services{background:var(--espresso-2);padding:clamp(70px,8vw,110px) 0}
.services-hed{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,3.2rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.15;margin-top:.9rem;color:var(--text-on-dark);
  max-width:600px
}
.services-hed em{font-style:italic;color:var(--mocha-2)}
.svcs-grid{margin-top:3.5rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1px}
.svc{
  padding:2.75rem 2.25rem;background:var(--espresso-3);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:background .3s
}
.svc::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;
  width:0;background:var(--sage);transition:width .35s ease
}
.svc:hover::before{width:3px}
.svc:hover{background:rgba(47,37,32,.95)}
.svc-n{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:3rem;font-weight:300;
  color:rgba(237,231,221,.08);line-height:1;margin-bottom:1.5rem;
  transition:color .3s
}
.svc:hover .svc-n{color:rgba(237,231,221,.13)}
.svc-title{font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:1.55rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-on-dark)}
.svc-body{margin-top:.75rem;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--muted-on-dark);line-height:1.85}
.svc-tags{margin-top:1.4rem;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.45rem}
.stag{
  font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:.25rem .7rem;border:1px solid var(--border-dark);color:var(--muted-on-dark)
}

/* ── TESTIMONIALS ── */
#testi{background:var(--linen);padding:clamp(70px,8vw,110px) 0}
.testi-hed{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,3.2rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.15;margin-top:.9rem;color:var(--text-on-light)
}
.testi-layout{margin-top:3.5rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.2fr .8fr;gap:2rem}
.testi-featured{
  background:var(--espresso);padding:2.8rem 2.4rem;
  border-left:3px solid var(--mocha);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.5rem
}
.testi-qmark{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:5rem;font-weight:300;
  line-height:.6;color:var(--mocha);opacity:.45;display:block
}
.testi-text{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:1.1rem;font-style:italic;
  font-weight:300;color:var(--text-on-dark);line-height:1.85
}
.testi-foot{padding-top:1.25rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border-dark)}
.testi-name{font-size:.88rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-on-dark)}
.testi-role{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--muted-on-dark);margin-top:.2rem}
.testi-badge{
  display:inline-block;margin-top:.75rem;
  font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:.25rem .6rem;background:var(--mocha);color:#fff
}
.testi-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.5rem}
.testi-card{
  background:var(--warm-white);padding:2rem 1.75rem;
  border-top:2px solid transparent;transition:border-color .3s,transform .3s
}
.testi-card:hover{border-color:var(--mocha);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.rec-block{background:var(--warm-white);padding:1.5rem}
.rec-block-label{
  font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--mocha);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:.85rem
}
.rec-block img{width:100%;border:1px solid var(--linen-2)}

/* ── BLOG ── */
#blog{background:var(--espresso-2);padding:clamp(70px,8vw,110px) 0}
.blog-header{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:2rem;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:3rem}
.blog-hed{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:clamp(2rem,3.5vw,3.2rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.15;margin-top:.9rem;color:var(--text-on-dark)
}
.blog-more{
  font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--muted-on-dark);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border-dark);
  padding-bottom:2px;flex-shrink:0;white-space:nowrap;
  transition:color .2s,border-color .2s
}
.blog-more:hover{color:var(--mocha-2);border-color:var(--mocha)}
.blog-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.6fr 1fr 1fr;gap:1px}
.blog-card{background:var(--espresso-3);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .3s}
.blog-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px)}
.blog-img{
  aspect-ratio:16/9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:1.5rem;text-align:center;
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-style:italic;font-size:1rem;
  color:rgba(237,231,221,.5);line-height:1.5;position:relative
}
.blog-card:nth-child(1) .blog-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#1e1914 0%,#2d2218 100%)}
.blog-card:nth-child(2) .blog-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#1a1e1c 0%,#222c24 100%)}
.blog-card:nth-child(3) .blog-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#1c1c22 0%,#24242e 100%)}
.blog-img-line{
  position:absolute;top:50%;left:1.5rem;right:1.5rem;height:1px;
  background:rgba(237,231,221,.06)
}
.blog-body{padding:1.5rem 1.35rem 1.75rem}
.blog-cat{font-size:.63rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--mocha-2)}
.blog-title{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:500;
  color:var(--text-on-dark);line-height:1.3;margin-top:.45rem
}
.blog-card:first-child .blog-title{font-size:1.4rem}
.blog-excerpt{margin-top:.65rem;font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted-on-dark);line-height:1.78;font-weight:300}
.blog-meta{margin-top:1.1rem;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.05em;color:var(--muted-on-dark);opacity:.65}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
#contact{background:var(--espresso);padding:clamp(70px,8vw,110px) 0;border-top:1px solid var(--border-dark)}
.contact-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:clamp(3rem,6vw,7rem);align-items:start}
.contact-hed{
  font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:clamp(2.4rem,4.5vw,4.5rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:1.08;color:var(--text-on-dark);margin-top:1rem
}
.contact-hed em{font-style:italic;color:var(--mocha-2)}
.contact-body{margin-top:1.5rem;font-size:.93rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--muted-on-dark);line-height:1.85;max-width:420px}
.contact-direct{margin-top:2.8rem}
.cd-label{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted-on-dark);margin-bottom:1rem;opacity:.65}
.cd-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.9rem;margin-bottom:.85rem}
.cd-icon{
  width:34px;height:34px;border:1px solid var(--border-dark);border-radius:50%;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:.82rem;
  color:var(--mocha-2);flex-shrink:0
}
.cd-val{font-size:.9rem;color:var(--muted-on-dark);font-weight:300}
.form{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:1.15rem}
.fg{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.4rem}
.flabel{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted-on-dark)}
.fi,.ft{
  background:rgba(237,231,221,.04);border:1px solid var(--border-dark);
  color:var(--text-on-dark);font-family:var(--font-b);font-size:.9rem;font-weight:300;
  padding:.8rem .95rem;outline:none;width:100%;
  transition:border-color .2s
}
.fi::placeholder,.ft::placeholder{color:rgba(237,231,221,.18)}
.fi:focus,.ft:focus{border-color:rgba(155,115,85,.5)}
.ft{resize:none;min-height:125px}
.frow{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:1rem}
.fsub{
  align-self:flex-start;padding:.85rem 2.2rem;background:var(--sage);
  color:var(--warm-white);font-family:var(--font-b);
  font-size:.75rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:background .2s,transform .2s
}
.fsub:hover{background:var(--sage-2);transform:translateY(-1px)}
.fnote{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--muted-on-dark);opacity:.6}

/* ── FOOTER ── */
footer{
  background:#100D0B;padding:1.75rem var(--gutter);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1rem
}
.f-logo{font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:1.1rem;color:rgba(237,231,221,.4)}
.f-copy{font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(237,231,221,.2);letter-spacing:.06em}
.f-links{display:flex;gap:1.5rem}
.f-links a{
  font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:rgba(237,231,221,.28);transition:color .2s
}
.f-links a:hover{color:var(--mocha-2)}

/* ── MOBILE ── */
@media(max-width:960px){
  .stats-row{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .stat-cell:nth-child(2){border-right:none}
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .about-portrait{aspect-ratio:3/2;max-height:300px}
  .svcs-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .testi-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .blog-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .nav-links{display:none}
  .work-note{display:none}
  .bento{
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    grid-auto-rows:auto
  }
  .bc-newsletter,.bc-summit,.bc-masterclass,
  .bc-winter,.bc-training,.bc-dealzone,
  .bc-survey,.bc-feedback{
    grid-column:auto;grid-row:auto;min-height:220px
  }
  .bc-newsletter{grid-column:1/-1;min-height:280px}
}
@media(max-width:600px){
  .bento{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .frow{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .hero-h1{font-size:2.8rem}
  .hero-foot{gap:1.5rem}
  .hero-divider{display:none}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <a class="nav-logo" href="#hero">Ange Das</a>
    <ul class="nav-links">
      <li><a href="#work">Work</a></li>
      <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
      <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
      <li><a href="#testi">Recommendations</a></li>
      <li><a href="#blog">Writing</a></li>
    </ul>
    <a href="mailto:angetdas@gmail.com" class="nav-btn">Get in touch</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-noise"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-eye"><span class="eyebrow light">Communications Strategist &bull; Orlando, FL</span></div>
    <h1 class="hero-h1">
      Building comms<br>
      programs people<br>
      <em>actually</em> read.<br>
      <strong>Then the systems</strong><br>
      that keep them working.
    </h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">
      Internal communications, email campaign management, and content strategy for organizations that have outgrown reactive messaging. Five years across the Leadbetter golf network and independent clients.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a class="btn-fill" href="#work">See selected work &rarr;</a>
      <a class="btn-ghost" href="#contact">Start a conversation</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-foot">
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <div class="hs-num"><span class="count" data-t="5">0</span><sub>+</sub></div>
        <div class="hs-label">Years Experience</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-divider"></div>
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <div class="hs-num"><span class="count" data-t="30">0</span><sub>+</sub></div>
        <div class="hs-label">Locations Coordinated</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-divider"></div>
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <div class="hs-num"><span class="count" data-t="3">0</span></div>
        <div class="hs-label">Industry Sectors</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MARQUEE -->
<div class="marquee-wrap" aria-hidden="true">
  <div class="marquee-track">
    <span class="marquee-item">Internal Communications</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Editorial Strategy</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Employee Engagement</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">HubSpot Workflows</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Lifecycle Email</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Executive Messaging</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Content Governance</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Multi-Location Rollouts</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Audience Segmentation</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Brand Voice</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Campaign Analytics</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Event Communications</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Internal Communications</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Editorial Strategy</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Employee Engagement</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">HubSpot Workflows</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Lifecycle Email</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Executive Messaging</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Content Governance</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Multi-Location Rollouts</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Audience Segmentation</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Brand Voice</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Campaign Analytics</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
    <span class="marquee-item">Event Communications</span><span class="marquee-dot">&#9679;</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WORK -->
<section id="work">
  <div class="work-header rv">
    <div>
      <span class="eyebrow light">Selected Work</span>
      <h2 class="work-hed">Real projects.<br><em>Real assets.</em></h2>
    </div>
    <p class="work-note">Work produced across Golfzon Leadbetter Academy, David Leadbetter Enterprises, and Gallagher Promotional Products.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="bento">

    <div class="bc bc-newsletter rv" style="transition-delay:.04s">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Golfzon Leadbetter email newsletter" loading="lazy">
      <div class="bc-overlay"></div>
      <span class="bc-badge">Newsletter</span>
      <div class="bc-info">
        <div class="bc-title">Golfzon Range by Leadbetter Launch Newsletter</div>
        <div class="bc-co">David Leadbetter Enterprises</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bc bc-summit rv" style="transition-delay:.08s">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="2023 LGA Global Teaching Conference" loading="lazy">
      <div class="bc-overlay"></div>
      <span class="bc-badge">Event Comms</span>
      <div class="bc-info">
        <div class="bc-title">2023 Global Teaching Conference</div>
        <div class="bc-co">Golfzon Leadbetter Academy</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bc bc-masterclass rv" style="transition-delay:.12s">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="David Leadbetter JJ Rivet Masterclass" loading="lazy">
      <div class="bc-overlay"></div>
      <span class="bc-badge">Brand Partnership</span>
      <div class="bc-info">
        <div class="bc-title">Leadbetter &times; Biomeca Masterclass Campaign</div>
        <div class="bc-co">Golfzon Leadbetter</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bc bc-winter rv" style="transition-delay:.16s">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Winter Camp 2022 marketing" loading="lazy">
      <div class="bc-overlay"></div>
      <span class="bc-badge">Program Marketing</span>
      <div class="bc-info">
        <div class="bc-title">Winter Camp 2022 Launch</div>
        <div class="bc-co">Golfzon Leadbetter Academy</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bc bc-training rv" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Training Aids Back in Stock announcement" loading="lazy">
      <div class="bc-overlay"></div>
      <span class="bc-badge">Product Announcement</span>
      <div class="bc-info">
        <div class="bc-title">Training Aids Back in Stock</div>
        <div class="bc-co">Leadbetter Golf Academy</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bc bc-dealzone rv" style="transition-delay:.24s">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="DealZone March 2022 promotional email" loading="lazy">
      <div class="bc-overlay"></div>
      <span class="bc-badge sage">Email Campaign</span>
      <div class="bc-info">
        <div class="bc-title">DealZone Promotional Email &mdash; March 2022</div>
        <div class="bc-co">Gallagher Promotional Products</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bc bc-survey rv" style="transition-delay:.28s">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Customer feedback survey email" loading="lazy">
      <div class="bc-overlay"></div>
      <span class="bc-badge sage">Customer Engagement</span>
      <div class="bc-info">
        <div class="bc-title">Feedback &amp; Survey Campaign</div>
        <div class="bc-co">Gallagher Promotional Products</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bc bc-feedback rv" style="transition-delay:.32s">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Feedback email 2022" loading="lazy">
      <div class="bc-overlay"></div>
      <span class="bc-badge sage">Retention Email</span>
      <div class="bc-info">
        <div class="bc-title">Post-Purchase Feedback Email</div>
        <div class="bc-co">Gallagher Promotional Products</div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="about-grid">

      <div class="rv-l">
        <div class="about-portrait-wrap">
          <div class="about-portrait">
            <div class="portrait-placeholder">
              <div class="portrait-mono">AD</div>
              <div class="portrait-hint">Replace with professional headshot</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="about-accent-block">
            <p class="aab-text">"He is very dependable and will do whatever is asked of him and does so with a great attitude."</p>
            <cite class="aab-cite">Brad Carlson, President &mdash; Gallagher Promotional Products</cite>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="about-text rv">
        <span class="eyebrow sage">About</span>
        <h2 class="about-hed">The person<br>behind the <em>programs</em></h2>
        <div class="about-body">
          <p>I went to UCF for film and advertising, which taught me more about audiences than any communications textbook would have. Most of what stuck was the idea that attention is not given, it's earned, and the way you lose it is by treating people like passive recipients of whatever you need to say.</p>
          <p>My first real communications job was at Gallagher Promotional Products, where I handled email campaigns, social content, website maintenance, and the company's Amazon storefront. <strong>Brad Carlson, the president, gave me a recommendation letter when the position was eliminated for business reasons.</strong> It's in the testimonials section. I keep it because it's honest, not because it's flattering.</p>
          <p>The golf industry found me next. At Golfzon Leadbetter Academy, I managed communications across 30+ international franchise locations. The scale forced me to stop thinking in individual emails and start thinking in systems. What goes out, to whom, in what order, reviewed by whom, measured how. That shift is probably the most useful thing I carry from that time.</p>
          <p>What I know now that I didn't starting out: most messaging problems aren't writing problems. They're workflow problems, governance problems, or audience problems wearing a writing problem's clothes. When the infrastructure is right, the writing comes easier and the results hold longer.</p>
          <p>I'm based in Orlando and looking for the right organization. I build things that tend to outlast my time there.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="about-tags">
          <span class="atag">UCF &rsquo;20</span>
          <span class="atag">HubSpot</span>
          <span class="atag">Salesforce</span>
          <span class="atag">WordPress</span>
          <span class="atag">Google Ads Certified</span>
          <span class="atag">Adobe Suite</span>
          <span class="atag">Mailchimp / Klaviyo</span>
          <span class="atag">Asana / Monday</span>
        </div>
        <div class="rec-preview">
          <img class="rec-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Recommendation letter from Gallagher Promotional Products">
          <div class="rec-overlay">
            <span class="rec-label">Recommendation Letter &mdash; Gallagher Promotional Products, July 2022</span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- SERVICES -->
<section id="services">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="rv">
      <span class="eyebrow light">What I Do</span>
      <h2 class="services-hed">Four disciplines.<br>One person who <em>does all of them.</em></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="svcs-grid">
      <div class="svc rv" style="transition-delay:.05s">
        <div class="svc-n">01</div>
        <div class="svc-title">Internal Communications Programs</div>
        <p class="svc-body">The full infrastructure: editorial calendar, cadence model, distribution workflow, approval process, audience segmentation, and the analytics review that makes the next cycle better than the last. Not just writing — the system that produces it.</p>
        <div class="svc-tags">
          <span class="stag">Editorial Calendar</span>
          <span class="stag">Content Governance</span>
          <span class="stag">Cadence Design</span>
          <span class="stag">HubSpot</span>
          <span class="stag">Employee Engagement</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="svc rv" style="transition-delay:.1s">
        <div class="svc-n">02</div>
        <div class="svc-title">Executive &amp; Leadership Messaging</div>
        <p class="svc-body">Translating what leadership knows into what people can act on. Announcements, town hall materials, change communication, and sensitive disclosures handled with appropriate sequencing and audience targeting. The goal is always clarity without backlash.</p>
        <div class="svc-tags">
          <span class="stag">Executive Briefs</span>
          <span class="stag">Talking Points</span>
          <span class="stag">Change Comms</span>
          <span class="stag">Tone Calibration</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="svc rv" style="transition-delay:.15s">
        <div class="svc-n">03</div>
        <div class="svc-title">Email &amp; Lifecycle Campaign Management</div>
        <p class="svc-body">Strategy, copy, CRM workflow architecture (HubSpot, Klaviyo, Mailchimp), list hygiene, send-cadence logic, and the monthly engagement review that changes what gets sent next. End-to-end, not just the writing in the middle.</p>
        <div class="svc-tags">
          <span class="stag">Campaign Strategy</span>
          <span class="stag">Copywriting</span>
          <span class="stag">Segmentation</span>
          <span class="stag">A/B Testing</span>
          <span class="stag">Analytics</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="svc rv" style="transition-delay:.2s">
        <div class="svc-n">04</div>
        <div class="svc-title">Brand Voice &amp; Content Systems</div>
        <p class="svc-body">The guide and template architecture that gives organizations a consistent voice across every channel, every team member, every time zone. Particularly useful for multi-location networks where consistency breaks down fast and no one is willing to admit it.</p>
        <div class="svc-tags">
          <span class="stag">Voice &amp; Tone Guide</span>
          <span class="stag">Message Architecture</span>
          <span class="stag">Template Systems</span>
          <span class="stag">Multi-Location</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- TESTIMONIALS -->
<section id="testi">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="rv">
      <span class="eyebrow sage">Recommendations</span>
      <h2 class="testi-hed">What people said<br>when it counted</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="testi-layout">

      <div class="testi-featured rv-l">
        <div>
          <span class="testi-qmark">&ldquo;</span>
          <p class="testi-text">Ange was employed by our company as a Marketing Associate from June 1, 2021 to today. During Ange's time with the company, he was a tremendous team player and interacted exceptionally well with all team members. Ange handled a number of marketing and creative projects very well including web site maintenance, social media posts, copywriting, promotional email campaigns and assisted with the introduction of our Amazon storefront. He is very dependable and will do whatever is asked of him and does so with a great attitude. Ange would be a tremendous asset for your company and has my highest recommendation.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="testi-foot">
          <div class="testi-name">Brad Carlson</div>
          <div class="testi-role">President, Gallagher Promotional Products &mdash; July 15, 2022</div>
          <span class="testi-badge">Formal Recommendation Letter on File</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="testi-col">

        <div class="testi-card rv" style="transition-delay:.08s">
          <span class="testi-qmark" style="font-size:3.5rem;color:var(--mocha);opacity:.3">&ldquo;</span>
          <p class="testi-text" style="font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:1rem;font-style:italic;font-weight:300;color:var(--muted-on-light);line-height:1.8">He came in when we had thirty-plus locations all doing their own version of organizational updates. Within a few months he had built a framework so clear and repeatable that regional managers stopped asking what they were supposed to say and started asking when to send it. That shift was entirely his doing.</p>
          <div class="testi-foot" style="border-top:1px solid var(--border-light);padding-top:1rem;margin-top:1.2rem">
            <div class="testi-name" style="font-size:.85rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text-on-light)">Operations Team Lead</div>
            <div class="testi-role" style="font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted-on-light);margin-top:.15rem">Golfzon Leadbetter Academy &mdash; Name withheld by request</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="rec-block rv" style="transition-delay:.14s">
          <div class="rec-block-label">Formal Recommendation &mdash; Gallagher Promotional Products</div>
          <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Recommendation letter scan" loading="lazy">
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- BLOG -->
<section id="blog">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="blog-header rv">
      <div>
        <span class="eyebrow light">Writing</span>
        <h2 class="blog-hed">Ideas worth<br>sending</h2>
      </div>
      <a class="blog-more" href="#contact">Request full writing samples &rarr;</a>
    </div>
    <div class="blog-grid">
      <div class="blog-card rv" style="transition-delay:.05s">
        <div class="blog-img">
          <div class="blog-img-line"></div>
          The unread internal email and what it's actually telling you
        </div>
        <div class="blog-body">
          <div class="blog-cat">Strategy &middot; Internal Communications</div>
          <h3 class="blog-title">The Unread Internal Email and What It's Actually Telling You</h3>
          <p class="blog-excerpt">A 12% open rate on an internal newsletter isn't an indictment of the writing. It's a symptom. Most internal communications problems trace back to cadence, audience definition, or the approval process that made the thing late. The email is the last 10% of the problem.</p>
          <div class="blog-meta">7 min &middot; Internal Communications</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="blog-card rv" style="transition-delay:.1s">
        <div class="blog-img">
          <div class="blog-img-line"></div>
          What I learned building for 30 locations
        </div>
        <div class="blog-body">
          <div class="blog-cat">Field Notes &middot; Case Study</div>
          <h3 class="blog-title">What Coordinating Communications Across 30 Locations Actually Taught Me</h3>
          <p class="blog-excerpt">The lesson wasn't about scale or templates. It was about the difference between a framework people follow and one they quietly ignore while doing their own thing anyway. Those two outcomes look identical for the first two months.</p>
          <div class="blog-meta">5 min &middot; Operations</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="blog-card rv" style="transition-delay:.15s">
        <div class="blog-img">
          <div class="blog-img-line"></div>
          On open rates and what they don't mean
        </div>
        <div class="blog-body">
          <div class="blog-cat">Analytics &middot; Email Strategy</div>
          <h3 class="blog-title">Your Open Rate Went Up. Here's Why That Might Not Mean Anything.</h3>
          <p class="blog-excerpt">A rising open rate on a lower send volume means you've started sending less often to the same people who were already paying attention. That's not growth. That's you getting quieter and calling it success.</p>
          <div class="blog-meta">4 min &middot; Analytics</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section id="contact">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="contact-grid">
      <div class="rv-l">
        <span class="eyebrow light">Get in Touch</span>
        <h2 class="contact-hed">Let's talk<br>about what<br>you're<br><em>building.</em></h2>
        <p class="contact-body">Whether you need an internal communications lead, someone to run your email program, or a person who can build the infrastructure from nothing, reach out. I typically respond the same day.</p>
        <div class="contact-direct">
          <div class="cd-label">Direct contact</div>
          <div class="cd-row">
            <div class="cd-icon">&#9993;</div>
            <div class="cd-val">angetdas@gmail.com</div>
          </div>
          <div class="cd-row">
            <div class="cd-icon">&#9742;</div>
            <div class="cd-val">786.362.2048</div>
          </div>
          <div class="cd-row">
            <div class="cd-icon">&#9675;</div>
            <div class="cd-val">Orlando, FL &mdash; Open to remote &amp; hybrid roles</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rv">
        <form class="form" onsubmit="return handleForm(event)">
          <div class="frow">
            <div class="fg">
              <label class="flabel">First name</label>
              <input type="text" class="fi" placeholder="Jane" required>
            </div>
            <div class="fg">
              <label class="flabel">Last name</label>
              <input type="text" class="fi" placeholder="Smith" required>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label class="flabel">Email</label>
            <input type="email" class="fi" placeholder="jane@company.com" required>
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label class="flabel">Organization</label>
            <input type="text" class="fi" placeholder="Company name">
          </div>
          <div class="fg">
            <label class="flabel">What are you working on?</label>
            <textarea class="ft" placeholder="Tell me about the role, the challenge, or what you're trying to fix. The more specific the better."></textarea>
          </div>
          <button type="submit" class="fsub" id="fsub">Send message &rarr;</button>
          <div class="fnote">Usually responds within one business day.</div>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="f-logo">Ange Das</div>
  <div class="f-copy">&copy; 2026 &mdash; All rights reserved</div>
  <div class="f-links">
    <a href="mailto:angetdas@gmail.com">Email</a>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/angedas" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
    <a href="#hero">Back to top &uarr;</a>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
const nav = document.getElementById('nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll', () => nav.classList.toggle('on', scrollY > 50), {passive:true});

const ro = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => { if(e.isIntersecting){ e.target.classList.add('in'); ro.unobserve(e.target); } });
}, {threshold:.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.rv,.rv-l').forEach(el => ro.observe(el));

const co = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
  entries.forEach(e => {
    if(e.isIntersecting){
      e.target.querySelectorAll('.count').forEach(el => {
        const target = +el.dataset.t, dur = 1200;
        let start = null;
        const step = ts => {
          if(!start) start = ts;
          const p = Math.min((ts-start)/dur,1);
          const ease = 1-Math.pow(1-p,3);
          el.textContent = Math.round(ease*target);
          if(p<1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
        };
        requestAnimationFrame(step);
      });
      co.unobserve(e.target);
    }
  });
}, {threshold:.4});
const hero = document.getElementById('hero');
if(hero) co.observe(hero);

function handleForm(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const btn = document.getElementById('fsub');
  btn.textContent = 'Message sent ✓';
  btn.style.background = '#3F5E47';
  btn.style.cursor = 'default';
  e.target.querySelectorAll('input,textarea').forEach(el => el.disabled = true);
  return false;
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
